get.summary: Enabled auth providers (google appears only when configured)

post.summary: Create a workspace (creator becomes admin)
Create a space

patch.summary: Change a member role / guest scoping (admin)

post.summary: Invite by email; guests require space_ids (admin)
Accept an invite by token (must match your email)
Create a database (auto: title field, system fields, default view)

get.summary: Database with live fields and views (schema introspection)

patch.summary: Rename / re-icon (creator); moving between spaces stays member+

delete.summary: Hard delete — body.confirm must equal the database name

post.summary: Add a field (select types accept initial options)

get.summary: How many live records carry a value for this field

post.summary: Convert field type within the compatibility matrix (dry_run supported)
Add a select option

patch.summary: Rename / recolor / reorder an option (O(1), ids are stable)

delete.summary: Delete an option — 409 with usage count unless confirm: true

get.summary: List records (manual order, optional q= title search, cursor)

post.summary: Create a record ({values} keyed by field api_name)
Query records: filter AST + sorts + q + keyset cursor (the workhorse)
Create up to 100 records atomically

patch.summary: Apply one values patch to up to 200 records (partial failures reported)

post.summary: Soft-delete up to 200 records
Restore up to 200 records from trash

get.summary: Resolve a record by its public per-database number (MN-087)
Single record, values keyed by api_name

post.summary: Duplicate: clone values + description + single/m2m links (not owned collections)
Atomic move: fractional reposition + optional value patch (kanban drop)
Restore from trash
Create a relation — needs creator on BOTH databases

delete.summary: Delete a relation, both its fields, and all links (confirm: true)

get.summary: Linked records for a relation field ({id, title} chips)

post.summary: Add links (409 when one-to-many already linked)

put.summary: Replace all links for this record on this field

post.summary: Create a saved view (config validated against live fields)

delete.summary: Delete a view (409 on the last one)

get.summary: Record description (BlockNote JSON; version 0 = never written)

put.summary: Write the description — 409 with current version on conflict

get.summary: My personal access tokens (prefix only — plaintext is never stored)

post.summary: Create a PAT — the token is shown ONCE in this response
Comment (guests included); mentions extracted server-side
Upload a file (multipart field "file"; size-capped)
Set my avatar (multipart field "file", png/jpeg/webp ≤1MB)

delete.summary: Remove my avatar (falls back to initials)

get.summary: Search records by title + databases/spaces by name (grant-scoped)
Records across databases where any person field contains me (MN-049)
Records the caller touched most recently (from activity)

post.summary: Mark one notification read
Mark everything read
Import CSV: fields "file", "mapping" (JSON), "dry_run" ("true"/"false")
Press a button field (editor+); actions run as the presser
Create a rule (trigger + condition + actions)
Dry-run a rule against one record
Save GitHub token and/or repo list
Import/refresh Issues + PRs; auto-links PRs to issues by #N / branch refs
Save Linear API key and/or team-key filter
Preview import counts per team — writes nothing
Import teams → spaces (Issues/Sprints/Projects), idempotent by Linear ID
Install a template (packs create a space; database templates take space_id)

delete.summary: Remove exactly the sample records templates created

get.summary: List access grants (optionally for one user)

post.summary: Grant a role on a space or database (upserts per scope)

get.summary: Current user's favorites in this workspace (resolved titles)

post.summary: Star a record or database

info.title: StoryOS API
info.description: The public StoryOS REST API. The web app is client #1 of this same API — everything the UI does, you can do.
